
```{ojs}
makeIsotype = function({ inputData }) {

  const chartIsotypeMain = vl.markPoint({
      size: 10,
      stroke: "black",
      strokeOpacity: 1,
      opacity: 0.9,
      dy: 0,
      clip: false,
    })
    .transform(
      vl.calculate("sequence(0, datum.value / 1000)").as("positions"),
      vl.flatten(["positions"]),
    )
    .encode(
      vl.y().fieldN("name").axis(null),
      // vl.yOffset()
      //   .fieldQ("positionY")
      //   .scale({
      //     domain: [-0.5, 5.5],
      //   }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("positions")
        .scale({
          domain: [0, 20],
          nice: false,
          zero: false,
        })
        .axis({
          title: null,
          labels: false,
          ticks: false,
          domain: false,
          grid: false,
        }),
      vl.fill()
        .fieldN("name")
        // .scale({
        //   range: colors2,
        // })
        .legend(false),
      vl.color()
        .fieldN("name")
        // .scale({
        //   range: colors2,
        // })
        .legend(false),
      vl.shape()
        .fieldN("name")
        // .scale({
        //   range: [
        //     path2,
        //     path1,
        //     ]
        // })
        // .legend(false)
    )

  const chartIsotypeText = vl.markText({
      size: 15,
      dx: 15,
      dy: 14,
      align: "center",
      opacity: 0.651,
      clip: true,
    })
    .transform(
      vl.calculate("['↜ ' + datum.text]").as("label"), // , datum.gesl
      vl.calculate("sequence(0, datum.value / 1000)").as("positions"),
      vl.flatten(["positions"]),
    )
    .encode(
      vl.y().fieldN("gesl").axis(null),
      // vl.yOffset()
      //   .fieldQ("positionY")
      //   .scale({
      //     domain: [-0.5, 5.5],
      //   }),
      vl.x()
        .fieldQ("positionX")
        .scale({
          domain: [-0.5, 10.5],
        }),
      vl.text().fieldN("label"),
    )

  return vl.layer(
    chartIsotypeMain,
    // chartIsotypeText,
  )
  .width(makeWidth(width) / 2)
  .height(340)
  .facet({
    field: "Quantile",
    type: "nominal",
    title: null,
    sort: ["Arm", "Reich"],
    scale: {
      domain: ["Arm", "Reich"],
      range: ["Arm", "Reich"],
    },
    header: {
      labelFontSize: 15,
      labelOrient: "top",
      // labelExpr: `datum.value == 'lower' ? 'Pension < ${rangeValue}€' : 'Pension > ${rangeValue}€'`,
      labelPadding: -20,
    },
  })
  .resolve({scale: {x: "shared", yOffset: "independent"}})
  .data(inputData)
  .config(config);

}
```
